# BDE Score™

> Open-source multi-factor stock analysis covering 74 stocks across US, HK, and China A-share markets.

## Key Features

- Multi-factor scoring: fundamentals, technicals, risk, sentiment
- Zero registration API access
- shields.io compatible dynamic badges
- GitHub Action for CI/CD integration
- EU AI Act Art.50 compliant transparency labels
- USDC payment on Base Chain (1 USDC = 1 year, 2,592,000 API calls)

## Quick Start

```bash
# All markets
curl https://atlantic-remains-atomic-floor.trycloudflare.com/api/analyze?market=ALL

# US market
curl https://atlantic-remains-atomic-floor.trycloudflare.com/api/analyze?market=US

# Individual stock
curl https://atlantic-remains-atomic-floor.trycloudflare.com/api/analyze?symbol=AAPL
```

## API Documentation

- [API Docs](https://atlantic-remains-atomic-floor.trycloudflare.com/docs) - Full API documentation
- [Health Check](https://atlantic-remains-atomic-floor.trycloudflare.com/api/health) - Service status
- [Market Status](https://atlantic-remains-atomic-floor.trycloudflare.com/api/market-status) - Market hours

## Supported Stocks

- US Market: 25 stocks (AAPL, GOOGL, MSFT, NVDA, TSLA, META, AMZN, etc.)
- HK Market: 26 stocks (Tencent, Alibaba, Meituan, Xiaomi, BYD, etc.)
- A-Share Market: 23 stocks (Moutai, Ping An, CATL, Midea, etc.)
